creator: trust_no_1@libero.it
text:
Created attachment 157229
output of 'make install clean'

On my system (FreeBSD 10.1) math/scilab does not build.
What I have done is:

1) portsnap fetch update
2) portmaster -a
3) cd /usr/ports/math/scilab
4) make fetch-recursive
5) make install clean

The build starts and all seems to go well, until it stops as reported later.

P.S. I tried to also run 'make MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes' but the error still persist.
Thank you.
